name: swedish-tax-holidays
description: Swedish-locale helpers for Skatteverket monthly tax-table lookup (2025/2026, columns 29-42), municipality list with tax rates, and public holiday calculation (Easter via Computus, Midsummer, All Saints, half-days).

endpoints: GET /api/holidays?year=2026 — all holidays for a year (optional)
GET /api/municipalities — full municipality list with tax tables (optional)

postInstall: 1. The tax JSON files are 320 KB each — they bundle into your build but won't be hot-reloaded; treat them as static reference data
2. The lib files import the JSON via relative paths (../data/...). Match the layout in module.json `files[]` or rewrite the imports if you use a different structure
3. New tax year? Add a tax-data-<year>.json + register it in tablesByYear in lib/tax-lookup.ts. Original parse script is in tidsrapport's scripts/parse-tax-tables.ts (parses Skatteverket PDF)
4. Holidays cover 1500+ — Easter is Computus, Midsummer is the Friday between Jun 19-25, All Saints' is the Saturday between Oct 31-Nov 6
